message:
fix(connectors): add C3.4 constraints to all 43 connector test tokens

The C3.4 default-deny enforcement rejects capability tokens without
constraints. Updated generate_valid_token() and generate_read_token()
helpers across 43 connectors (48 test files) to include
CapabilityConstraints with resource_allow: ["*"]. Added ciborium
dev-dependency where missing. Spot-checked: Slack (51), GitHub (64),
Telegram (54) all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
